title: Crust Security Rules
description: JSON Schema for crust YAML security rules (~/.crust/rules.d/*.yaml). Supports progressive disclosure from simple glob patterns (Level 1) to composite conditions (Level 5).

stringOrArray.title: StringOrArray
stringOrArray.description: A single string or an array of strings. Both forms are equivalent.

severity.title: Severity
severity.description: Rule severity level. Defaults to 'critical' if omitted.

operation.title: Operation
operation.description: A filesystem or network operation type. 'all' expands to all operation types.

ruleSource.title: RuleSource
ruleSource.description: Origin of a rule. Set at load time, not user-configurable.

matchConfig.title: MatchConfig
matchConfig.description: A single match condition. At least one field must be set.

path.description: Regex pattern to match against resolved filesystem paths.

command.description: Regex pattern to match against shell commands (Bash tool only).

host.description: Regex pattern to match against hostnames and IP addresses.

content.description: Regex pattern to match against write content or raw JSON arguments.

tool.description: Tool name(s) this condition applies to. Case-insensitive.

ruleConfig.title: RuleConfig
ruleConfig.description: A security rule definition. Exactly one of block, match, all, or any must be present.

oneOf.title: Simple Block Rule (Level 1-3)
oneOf.description: Block access to paths matching glob patterns, with optional exceptions.

except.description: Glob pattern(s) to exclude from blocking.

name.description: Rule identifier. Auto-generated from the block pattern if omitted.

actions.description: Operations this rule applies to. Defaults to all operations if omitted.

message.description: Message shown when the rule blocks. Auto-generated if omitted.

oneOf.title: Advanced Match Rule (Level 4)
oneOf.description: Match using regex patterns on paths, commands, hosts, content, or tool names.

actions.description: Operations this rule applies to. Defaults to all operations if omitted.

message.description: Message shown when the rule blocks.

oneOf.title: Composite AND Rule (Level 5)
oneOf.description: Block when ALL conditions match (logical AND).

all.description: All conditions must match for the rule to trigger.

actions.description: Operations this rule applies to. Defaults to all operations if omitted.

message.description: Message shown when the rule blocks.

oneOf.title: Composite OR Rule (Level 5)
oneOf.description: Block when ANY condition matches (logical OR).

any.description: Any condition matching triggers the rule.

actions.description: Operations this rule applies to. Defaults to all operations if omitted.

message.description: Message shown when the rule blocks.
